mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_QUIZ_ATTEMPT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT(ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT, USER_ID, QUIZ_ID) VALUES(#{id}, #{quizAttemptScore}, #{quizAttemptTotalCount}, #{userId}, #{quizId})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE, QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT, USER_ID, QUIZ_ID FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ID DESC
